message:
Add live Redis conformance tests for BITMAP commands

Add CORE_BITMAP_LIVE_STABLE_CASES with ~103 test cases covering:
- SETBIT/GETBIT basic operations and high offsets
- BITCOUNT whole string, byte ranges, negative ranges
- BITPOS finding first set/clear bit with ranges
- BITOP AND/OR/XOR/NOT operations
- BITFIELD SET/GET/INCRBY with u8/i8/u16/i16 types
- BITFIELD overflow modes (WRAP, SAT, FAIL)
- BITFIELD_RO read-only operations
- Error cases for wrong types, arity, invalid values

Excludes cases with error message variations between
fixture expectations and live Redis 7.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 struct VendoredRedisOracle {
     child: Child,
     port: u16,
@@ -2507,3 +2620,27 @@ fn core_generic_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
     );
     assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn core_bitmap_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
+    let cfg = HarnessConfig::default_paths();
+    let oracle_server = VendoredRedisOracle::start(&cfg);
+    let oracle = LiveOracleConfig {
+        host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+        port: oracle_server.port,
+        ..LiveOracleConfig::default()
+    };
+    let report = run_live_redis_diff_for_cases(
+        &cfg,
+        "core_bitmap.json",
+        CORE_BITMAP_LIVE_STABLE_CASES,
+        &oracle,
+    )
+    .expect("bitmap live diff");
+    assert_eq!(
+        report.total, report.passed,
+        "mismatches: {:?}",
+        report.failed
+    );
+    assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
+}
